 or watch videos to unlock schedule message Unlock Features Backup and Restore Secure Message Remove Ads Schedule a Message 24/7 User Support Message Text Size General Advanced Setting About Phone Privacy Policy Terms & Condition Check for update Try Again Backup and Restore message Message can be backup to your device and can be backup anytime Backup Restore Done Auto-expire OTP No Available Languages
Enter your answer
6 Digit password
2 Step Verification Use security questions to recover your password 
 in case if you forget your password Select any Security Question Which is your favorite movies ? Which is your favourite food ? Which is your favourite actress ? What’s your lucky number ? In which city were you born ? Two-step Verification Confirm Sign in using fingerprint Enter Messages Pin Authentication succeeded! Authentication failed. Authentication error: New Password Enter New Password Confirm Password Turn off Turn off two-step verification Forgot PIN Change PIN Turn On Two-Step Verification has been turned on Move to Private Remove to Private Show Notification "To change the password, add the answer 
 to the questions asked" "It is using private chat. If you register yourself on message again, you'll have to enter your PIN." "It is using two-step verification. If you register your on message again, you'll have to enter your PIN." "When you re-register message, make sure to enable 
 privacy chat for added security.
 this will require a PIN." "When you re-register message, make sure to enable 
 two-step verification for added security.
 this will require a PIN." "Enter Pin" Show a character count Color theme What’s New 2-Step Verification Auto Reply Secret conversations allow users to have confidential discussions with friends by using end-to-end encrypted messages in private chats. This ensures that only the sender and recipient can view the messages. In addition, the secret messages automatically delete themselves after a certain time, adding an extra layer of confidentiality. Go to Setting > Privacy and Security > Private Chat Go to Setting > Conversation Setting > Conversation Swipe Motion The swipe mode and various actions like Archive, Delete, Call, Mark as Read, Pin, and Private Chat can be customized in the messenger app. This can be done by using the change button and then selecting customize swipe actions. Go to Setting > Conversation Setting > Message Corner The seekbar can be used to change the message corner and then check the chat screen for the desired cool action. Go to Setting > Conversation Setting > Color theme This messenger app allows users to change the color theme, customize settings, and access four different modes. Users have the flexibility to change the theme at any time and enjoy the app in their preferred color scheme. Select your auto-reply word and tap to easily send smart replies. Go to Setting > Driving Mode You can control driving settings for Assistant, toggle driving mode, and allow Assistants to handle incoming calls and respond to messages while driving. Confirm PIN Security Question Turned on 2. Step - 1 Step - 2 Step - 3 Step - 4 Select Your Language Translate to Tap to turn on Button Create 6 Digit Pin For two-fector Authentication Added Security Question for your Security Two Step verification has been turned on Two-factor authentication is a security measure that adds an extra layer of protection to Business Manager accounts. It requires users to input a security code whenever they attempt to access their account from an unrecognized browser or device. This helps prevent unauthorized access and enhances the overall security of Business Manager accounts. Select your auto-reply word and tap to easily send 
 smart replies. Swipe from the side to check if your message has been sent You can use this method to check the messages you've made and the time Set your message font size in different formats like small, large, extra small Show More Next theme, customize settings, and access four differentscheme. modes. Users have the flexibility to change the theme at any time and enjoy the app in their preferred color Customize the actions of Call, Mark as Read, Pin, and Private Chat buttons by selecting the customize swipe option in the messenger app. This can be accomplished using the swipe mode and various actions. Two-factor authentication enhances Business Manager account security by requiring users to input a security code when accessing their accounts, thus providing an additional layer of protection. Translate Conversation 8. Translate Conversation Translate Message This messenger app enables users to engage in conversations effortlessly. Language translation can be swiftlychanged by tapping the translate icon. However, thisicon remains visible for only 30 seconds. Should the user wish to translate the conversation thereafter, they can select the conversation, click on the translate icon, and modify the language. These features are remarkably simple and user-friendly. Notification Action Button 1 Button 2 Button 3 None Reply Wake screen Delivery confirmation Select Your Preferred Language Schedule Scheduled message Copy text Send Now Send a message automatically at the
time you choose List view Swipe motion Signature Day Dark Night Arctic Enter Your Signature Please select another Signature Advance Add Category Rename Category Rename Broadcast Add Contact Categories Please Select Another Category Name Please Select Another Broadcast Name Category Name Please Enter Category Name Please Enter Broadcast Name Manage category All Categories Create Category Edit Do you really want to delete this Category? Select the conversations you want to add to the category Remove From Category Create Group Group Name Add Member People

 be recovered any time Long press on any message to instantly translate it into your preferred language. Enhance communication and understanding with this convenient feature Instant Translation on Long Press Translate Message with a Click Translate messages effortlessly with a single click. Streamline communication across languages by clicking this intuitive button. Expand Options Click here to reveal additional options for customization and control. Streamline your experience by accessing advanced features with just one tap Profile Access Shortcut Click here to quickly access your profile details. Streamline navigation and manage your account effortlessly with this convenient shortcut. Gallery Default Candy Unicorn Rocket Ocean Apple Honey Kiwi Rose Lavender Ocean %s items 1 item Switch theme Day mode Dark mode Night mode Arctic mode Custom Wallpaper Reset Solid Colors My Photos Default Wallpaper Gallery Resents Preview Unread Message 2 Wednesday, 13 March Pinch to zoom. Set Custom Wallpaper Image Crop, Wallpapers, Flyers, Messages & Tools built this app as a Freemium app. This SERVICE is provided by Image Crop, Wallpapers, Flyers, Messages & Tools at no cost and is intended for use as is.

 This page is used to inform visitors regarding my policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of Personal Information if anyone decides to use my Service.
 If you choose to use my Service, then you agree to the collection and use of information to this policy. The Personal Information that I collect is used for providing and improving the Service. I will not use or share your information with anyone except as described in this Privacy Policy.

 The terms used in this Privacy Policy have the same meanings as in our Terms and Conditions, which are accessible at this app unless otherwise defined in this Privacy Policy. Information Collection and Use For a better experience, while using our Service, I may require you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information. The information that I request will be retained on your device and is not collected by me in any way.
 The app does use third-party services that may collect information used to identify you.
 Link to the privacy policy of third-party service providers used by the app Google Play Services AdMob Facebook Firebase Crashlytics Google Analytics for Firebase Log Data I want to inform you that whenever you use my Service, in the case of an error in the app I collect data and information (through third-party products) on your phone called Log Data. This Log Data may include information such as your device Internet Protocol (“IP”) address, device name, operating system version, the configuration of the app when utilizing my Service, the time and date of your use of the Service, and other statistics. Cookies Cookies are files with a small amount of data that are commonly used as anonymous unique identifiers. These are sent to your browser from the websites that you visit and are stored on your device's internal memory. This Service does not use these “cookies” explicitly. However, the app may use third-party code and libraries that use “cookies” to collect information and improve their services. You have the option to either accept or refuse these cookies and know when a cookie is being sent to your device. If you choose to refuse our cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of this Service. Service Providers I may employ third-party companies and individuals due to the following reasons: To facilitate our Service; To provide the Service on our behalf; To perform Service-related services; or To assist us in analyzing how our Service is used. I want to inform users of this Service that these third parties have access to their Personal Information. The reason is to perform the tasks assigned to them on our behalf. However, they are obligated not to disclose or use the information for any other purpose. Security I value your trust in providing us with your Personal Information, thus we are striving to use commercially acceptable means of protecting it. But remember that no method of transmission over the internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure and reliable,
 and I cannot guarantee its absolute security.

 The below details the processing of personal data and the purpose: 1. Contact Information : If you voluntarily contact us, you may be required to provide us with certain information such as your name, email address and any additional information you decide to share with us. We don't receive your email. We only have access to this matter if there was any will on the user's behalf to get in touch via survey or form. 2. Phone number : As part of our SMS/MMS Messaging feature, you will be required to provide us permissions to your Phone Number. We may use your encrypted phone number to privately collect the information required by our SMS/MMS messaging feature, such as when your messages are received and read or when someone is writing to you. We don't store the content of your communications on our servers. The phone number will be used when you send messages, and it'll only be used by your cell carrier. All SMS/MMS, phone numbers are transited via your mobile carrier never by us when you send/receive messages. 3. GPS Location Information : Certain features may require access to your GPS location permissions. In addition, in certain features, we will use 'access fine location' permission in the background while you are using the app so that we can locate the wifi networks and connection to provide the services. This information will be processed to provide the services. Further, we wish to clarify that we don't store any GPS location information on our servers and any processing activity shall be done solely on your device. 4. Push Notifications : We may store Firebase Cloud Messages token. If you wish to stop getting push notifications, you may do so simply by disabling push notifications on your device's settings. This information will be processed to allow us to send push notifications to users from our server. 5. Passwords of any kind : All passwords are fully encrypted, and your access credentials are under the most strict algorithm security methods. 6. Credit card or any billing or payment details : All sensitive data regarding payments such as credit card and/or banking information is handled & processed by Google for any digital products consumed through the apps. We don't have access to this information or related banking elements. Links to Other Sites This Service may contain links to other sites. If you click on a third-party link, you will be directed to that site. Note that these external sites are not operated by me. Therefore, I strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of these websites. I have no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party sites or services. Children’s Privacy These Services do not address anyone under the age of 13. I do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from children under 13 years of age. In the case I discover that a child under 13 has provided me with personal information, I immediately delete this from our servers. If you are a parent or guardian and you are aware that your child has provided us with personal information, please contact me so that I will be able to take the necessary actions. Contact Us If you have any questions or suggestions about my Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact me at profagnesh009@gmail.com. Set theme Set wallpaper For all chats For this chat Set default wallpaper Set password reset email password reset email Edit Message Enter Message Enter email address Forgot Password Using Email id Please remember to keep your password secure and do not share it with anyone. © 2024 Messages : SMS & Private Chat. it’s your default message app.

Enable overlay permission. For better experience Enable After Call Feature. App Overlay Permission Enable Feature You can disable this anytime in setting. By tapping Agree & continue, you indicate that you have read out
Privacy Policy
.
Agree & Continue Welcome to Messages Permissions We access your call status during incoming and outgoing calls to monitor the call's activity and display After Call Screen information. This feature improves call management by providing you with relevant call details after call ends. Support Monthly Plan Yearly Plan Pay Nothing Now Year /Month /Day Prime Cost Ethan Reynolds Olivia Mitchell Jackson Carter Zoe Anderson Incredible App for Safeguarding Precious Memories Unbelievable Memory Guardian App Exceptional Tool to Preserve Cherished Moments Outstanding App for Securing Your Special Memories Absolutely love this messaging app! The interface is clean and user-friendly, making it a breeze to stay connected with friends and family. The features are top-notch This one really good messaging app. I am using still last one month but it replace my defult messaging application. very useful feature like language translation Great text messaging app! Easy to use, fast, and secure. I love the customization options and the ability to sync across devices. Highly recommended! Hands down the best messaging app out there! It's fast, reliable, and packed with awesome features. I especially appreciate the security measures in place Chetan Patel chaitany gevareeya Julian Williams Mohimin Top-Rated Text Messaging App: Seamless, Fast, Secure, and Customizable! Ultimate Messaging App: Features! App Thriving Despite Privacy. Smooth Interface; Regrettable Deletion Great text messaging app! Easy to use, fast, and secure. I love the customization options and the ability to sync across devices. Highly recommended! Enjoying this app, still my top choice despite invasiveness. Noticing concerns like text message privacy, but overall it's excellent. Improvements since my review show responsiveness. They're back as #1. ❤️ Found an amazing messaging app! Been using it for a month. It's replaced my default one. Awesome features like translation, font styles, and themes. Overall, great experiences with smooth interfaces. Accidentally deleted important work texts once, couldn't retrieve. With Premium, you get powerful tools, early access to new features, and a seriously better chat experience. Let’s gooo! Increased Message Limits Store up to 100,000 messages, Unlimited pinned chats, and more. Faster Sync & Smart Backup Experience lightning-fast priority syncing — no delays, just seamless performance.
